sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62029" key="latagei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰτᾰγ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n62029.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the vessel into which the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λάταξ</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">falls</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
